positive: A minimalist, stylish, and highly detailed illustration of a stylized mountain range with clear, sharp silhouettes against a vibrant sunset sky. The composition is centered, featuring layered peaks and negative space. The color palette is limited to deep indigo, burnt orange, coral pink, and warm gold, giving it a retro-travel poster aesthetic. Include subtle, abstract elements like floating geometric stars and a stylized crescent moon. The overall mood should be uplifting, majestic, and modern. Perfect for a screen-printed textile design. Vector style, flat graphic, high contrast, clean lines, symmetrical balance, photorealistic quality.
negative: blur, artifacts, noise, text, watermark, logo, trademark, messy, poor composition, bad anatomy, jpeg artifacts, low resolution, fuzzy, illegible, cartoonish, hyperdetailed photorealism
